name: remote-debug-agent
description: Safe remote Linux debugging through a local SSH-backed agent.

interface.shortDescription: Debug Linux servers through a safe local SSH agent
interface.longDescription: Remote Debug Agent lets Codex inspect approved paths and run whitelisted diagnostic commands on a remote Linux server through a local Node agent. It can also prepare one-time command drafts for explicit user-approved execution when enabled. The local agent enforces command allowlists, path boundaries, SSH configuration, timeouts, one-time draft hashes, and audit logging.
